title: Fix live_session boundary mismatch with push_navigate
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/after_login_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.AfterLoginLive). On successful login, the post-login flow crosses from a public live_session to an authenticated live_session. The redirect must use push_navigate(socket, to: ~p"/dashboard") — NOT push_patch — because patch can't cross live_session boundaries. Add a comment explaining the constraint. Include handle_event("submit_login") that calls MyApp.Accounts.authenticate and, on success, performs the push_navigate.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing that patch cannot cross live_session boundaries.
